notCovered: confidence / source / reason — derived grades have no ground truth; never assert them
authType is asserted against STATIC detection only (agent phase excluded) — see TD-166
_unfilled: STRUCTURE ONLY — the harness reports this app as INVALID/UNFILLED until Raj fills it. Raj supplies: verifiedBy, verifiedOn (ISO date), and expected[]. Each expected entry = { field, assert, value|values, basis }. field ∈ renderingModel|authType|crawlStrategy|appName|baseUrl|loginUrl|signals.<name>. assert ∈ equals|notEquals|oneOf|atLeast|atMost|present|absent. basis is REQUIRED. Signals available (names carry their definition, ADR-021 §2): signals.frameworkMountPointCount, signals.frameworkScriptCount, signals.rawDomAnchorCount, signals.formCount, signals.passwordFieldCount, signals.sameOriginNavigableLinkCount, signals.jsClickableCount. High-leverage starter (VALUE IS RAJ'S TO FILL): signals.rawDomAnchorCount atLeast <N> (the portal has ~376 raw anchors). NOTE: signals.sameOriginNavigableLinkCount is 0 here BY DESIGN (TD-162 CLOSED WAD) — 375 of 376 anchors are cross-origin language editions; it and rawDomAnchorCount measure DIFFERENT properties (the ADR-021 lesson) and must not be conflated.
